hero.subtitle: A Timeless Nuance
hero.title: Resonance within Silence
hero.description: An elegant synthesis of professional discipline and the profound serenity of the piano. A refined curation dedicated entirely to pure resonance and the nature of the unique moment.

bio.title: A Disciplined Pursuit of Beauty
content: Every note is not merely a sound; it is a refined bridge reaching across time. This process, where sharp professionalism yields to the flawless nuances of the piano, is the clearest and most definitive form of patience.

Compositions are meticulously crafted accompanied by profound serenity. This space is a carefully designed invitation for listeners who feel the power of the present moment and choose to walk the long path toward the perfect timbre.

archive.subtitle: Refined Selections
archive.title: The Resonance Archive
archive.description: Compositions that reach beyond time, the pure product of discipline and serenity. You are invited to re-experience these meticulously crafted nuances.

choices.subtitle: Collective Nuance
choices.title: The Resonance of the Future
choices.description: The acoustics of this space are completed by your silent contributions. You are invited to determine the next piece for that sharp moment when time stands still.
choices.toast: Your nuance preference has been recorded in a refined manner. Thank you for your participation in the process.

request.subtitle: Curation Invitation
request.title: A New Nuance to Fill the Silence
request.description: Capturing the correct resonance is a truly professional dedication. Guide this timeless archive by sharing that unique timbre waiting to be discovered.
request.quote: "A disciplined pursuit is the only path to the true beauty of the moment."
request.toast: Your precious nuance has been taken into the curation process.
request.fulfilledDescription: Compositions that have become permanent by being meticulously crafted and interpreted with professional serenity.
